queries.question: List the projects, including their names, milestones and their real estate developers.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    dp.project_name AS Project_Name,
    pm.milestone_description AS Milestone,
    oc.name AS Company_Name
FROM 
    Development_Project dp
JOIN 
    Project_Milestone pm ON dp.id = pm.development_project_id
JOIN 
    Real_Estate_Developer oc ON dp.developer_id = oc.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_name ?milestone_description ?name WHERE {
  ?dp a :Development_Project .
  ?pm a :Project_Milestone .
  ?pm p:hasDevelopment_Project ?dp .
  ?oc a :Real_Estate_Developer .
  ?dp p:hasReal_Estate_Developer ?oc .
  ?dp p:project_name ?project_name .
  ?pm p:milestone_description ?milestone_description .
  ?oc p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Show me all projects by contractor
queries.sql:
SELECT dp.project_name AS Project_Name, oc.name AS Company_Name
FROM Development_Project dp
JOIN Contractor oc ON dp.Contractor_id = oc.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_name ?name WHERE {
  ?dp a :Development_Project .
  ?oc a :Contractors .
  ?dp p:hasContractor ?oc .
  ?dp p:project_name ?project_name .
  ?oc p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: Show me all projects by developer
queries.sql:
SELECT dp.project_name AS Project_Name, oc.name AS Company_Name
FROM Development_Project dp
JOIN Real_Estate_Developer oc ON dp.developer_id = oc.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_name ?name WHERE {
  ?dp a :Development_Project .

  ?dp p:project_name ?project_name .

queries.question: Show me all projects by developer and contractor
queries.sql:
SELECT dp.project_name AS Project_Name, oc.name, co.name
FROM Development_Project dp
JOIN Real_Estate_Developer oc ON dp.developer_id = oc.id JOIN Contractor co ON dp.Contractor_id = oc.id
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): gold typo: Contractor joined ON oc.id (developer); NL intent = project+own devel

queries.question: List the projects, including their names, milestones and their contractors.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    dp.project_name AS Project_Name,
    pm.milestone_description AS Milestone,
    oc.name AS Company_Name
FROM 
    Development_Project dp
JOIN 
    Project_Milestone pm ON dp.id = pm.development_project_id
JOIN 
    Contractor oc ON dp.Contractor_id = oc.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?project_name ?milestone_description ?name WHERE {
  ?dp a :Development_Project .
  ?pm a :Project_Milestone .
  ?pm p:hasDevelopment_Project ?dp .
  ?oc a :Contractors .
  ?dp p:hasContractor ?oc .
  ?dp p:project_name ?project_name .
  ?pm p:milestone_description ?milestone_description .
  ?oc p:name ?name .
}

queries.question: List the projects, including their names, milestones, their contractors and their real estate developers.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    dp.project_name AS Project_Name,
    pm.milestone_description AS Milestone,
    oc.name, co.name
FROM 
    Development_Project dp
JOIN 
    Project_Milestone pm ON dp.id = pm.development_project_id
JOIN 
    Real_Estate_Developer oc ON dp.developer_id = oc.id JOIN Contractor co ON dp.Contractor_id = oc.id
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): gold typo (as q3) + milestone; NL intent = project+milestone+own developer+own c
